responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete final production closeout for IVX Holdings: resolve all blockers, deploy fixes, verify production, and certify — currently focused on Android crash + horizontal cropping repair and new APK build

## Constraints & Preferences
- Store ALL timestamps in UTC only; convert to local only for display
- Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically — manual email + password required on every launch
- App colors must match landing page — `#FFD700` gold, `#00C48C` green, `#FF4D4D` red, `#4A90D9` blue
- Do not change Android package name (`com.ivxholdings.app`) or iOS bundle identifier
- Do not create new project, replace IVX, reset repo, switch to localhost, or add Rork dependencies
- Landing QA: do not mark production ready because routes return 200; require live evidence
- Do not write COMPLETE, CERTIFIED, VERIFIED or FINAL until every required QA item passes
- If real-device test cannot be performed, report: BLOCKED — REAL DEVICE QA NOT EXECUTED
- CORS must allow only: `https://ivxholding.com`, `https://www.ivxholding.com`, `https://chat.ivxholding.com`, approved local dev origins
- Use `bun x` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- EAS credentials (`EXPO_TOKEN`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID`) NOT available — building APK locally with Gradle instead
- Reels refactor: only 1 active player, max 3 mounted (active ± 1), 80% viewability threshold
- NEVER ask user for credentials — find them in the project or work around the blocker
- Autonomous dashboard: never fabricate activity; every item must have real evidence; show IDLE if no task executing
- Status must be `QA IN PROGRESS` until ALL required items pass including real-device QA, screen recordings, and CloudFront invalidation
- expo-file-system v19 uses `File`/`Directory` classes; legacy API available via `expo-file-system/legacy` import
- Android Gradle build requires `--no-watch-fs` flag (Watchman gets stuck in sandbox)
- Real Android device test was performed and FAILED — app crashed after ~14 seconds, UI horizontally cropped; do not mark Android QA as passed

## Progress
### Done
- **17-section IVX Holdings production QA audit COMPLETED** — full evidence-based audit written to `qa-evidence/FINAL_OWNERSHIP_QA_AUDIT.md`
- **`IVX_DISASTER_RECOVERY.md` CREATED** at project root — 16-step clean-room recovery procedure, env var inventory, service inventory, deployment runbook, rollback procedure
- **Rork dependency audit: ZERO runtime dependencies confirmed**: `@rork-ai/toolkit-sdk` removed, `withRorkMetro` removed, `rork.json` absent, URL guard blocks `*.rork.com`
- **GitHub repo**: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`, branch `main`. Git remote through `rork-git-router.rork-direct.workers.dev` as transport proxy
- **Git sync RESOLVED**: Local HEAD = GitHub HEAD = `31dc37dffce130e1aac0b35786ea1b2857f6fa0f` — all commits synced, zero unpushed
- **CORS wildcard FIXED (Phase 5)**: 3 locations changed from `*` to `https://ivxholding.com` — `backend/hono.ts` line 5071, `backend/api/ivx-owner-action-requests.ts` lines 348 & 356. Verified live
- **Dashboard export IMPLEMENTED (Phase 7)**: New file `expo/src/modules/ivx-owner-ai/services/ivxDashboardExport.ts` — CSV/JSON/PDF export for 10 report types. Export UI added to `expo/app/ivx/autonomous-ops.tsx`
- **TypeScript: Both frontend and backend compile with 0 errors**. Fixed 4 pre-existing backend TS errors
- **iOS bundle ID FIXED**: Changed from `app.rork.r64gj6i3shhxqnlbhiewv` to `com.ivxholdings.app` in `ios-ivx/Ivx.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj` (all 6 occurrences)
- **Analytics infrastructure AUDITED and EXPANDED**: 12 first-party events, 5 ad platform events, 4 reel events. Added reel_view/complete/like/comment/share/save and registration_start
- **Android versionCode incremented**: 4→5 in `expo/app.config.ts` for fresh build
- **Production regression ALL PASS (Phase 10)**: 10/10 public routes 200, 4/4 protected routes 401, 2/2 chat routes 200, reels feed 6 videos unified, member count verified
- **Android crash ROOT CAUSE DIAGNOSED**: `DealVideoCard` had `shouldPlay={true}` hardcoded — every video card in home feed autoplayed simultaneously, overloading Android ExoPlayer/MediaCodec decoders causing OOM/native crash within ~14 seconds. No ErrorBoundary wrapped these cards.
- **Android crash FIX APPLIED**: `DealVideoCard.tsx` — added viewability detection via `useWindowDimensions` + `viewRef.current.measure()`, only plays when card is ≥60% visible. Added `AppState` listener to pause on background. Added poster-first rendering when not playing (shows poster Image + Play icon overlay instead of mounting SafeVideo). Added `Play` icon import and `playOverlay`/`playCircle` styles.
- **Cropping ROOT CAUSE DIAGNOSED**: `bottomGradient` in videos.tsx had `left: -14, right: -70` pushing content off-screen; `TrustDealCard.headerRow` had `salePriceChip` with `minWidth: 118` in non-wrapping row; `InvestorFirstFeed` passed full `cardWidth` without subtracting padding; `SafeAreaView` in home.tsx only handled top edge; `market.tsx` `indexBannerStats` overflowed on narrow screens
- **Cropping FIXES APPLIED (7 files)**:
  - `expo/app/videos.tsx`: `bottomGradient` changed from `left: -14, right: -70` to `left: 0, right: 0`
  - `expo/components/TrustDealCard.tsx`: `salePriceChip` changed from `minWidth: 118` to `flexShrink: 1, maxWidth: 130`; `headerRow` added `flexWrap: 'wrap'` and `gap: 8`; `headerCopy` added `minWidth: 0`
  - `expo/components/InvestorFirstFeed.tsx`: Added `VideoCardBoundary` class ErrorBoundary wrapping each DealVideoCard; added `safeCardWidth = Math.max(cardWidth - padH * 2 - 4, 280)` used for `galleryWidth`
  - `expo/components/SafeVideo.tsx`: HLS fallback on Android changed from returning `null` to returning the HLS URI (ExoPlayer handles basic HLS, null caused infinite loading/resource leaks)
  - `expo/app/(tabs)/(home)/home.tsx`: `SafeAreaView` changed from `edges={['top']}` to `edges={['top', 'left', 'right']}`
  - `expo/app/(tabs)/market.tsx`: `indexBannerStats` added `flexWrap: 'wrap'`, `gap: 8`; `indexBannerStat` added `minWidth: 70`
- **Post-fix verification**: TypeScript 0 errors, Lint 0 errors (5 pre-existing warnings in changed files)

### In Progress
- **Android APK build with crash/cropping fixes** — Gradle build repeatedly fails at `createBundleReleaseJsAndAssets` because Metro (launched by Gradle) tries to start Watchman which refuses to run in sandbox (`nice_value=19, min_acceptable_nice_value=0`). Multiple approaches tried: `--no-watch-fs`, killing watchman, `WATCHMAN_SOCKFILE=""`, fake watchman script at `/tmp/fake-bin/watchman` (exits 0), PATH manipulation. `metro.config.js` already has `config.watcher.useWatchman = false` but Gradle-launched Metro still calls Watchman. Attempting pre-bundle + Gradle approach.

### Blocked
- **Android APK build BLOCKED by Watchman**: Gradle's `createBundleReleaseJsAndAssets` task launches Metro which calls Watchman. Watchman refuses to start due to process priority (`nice_value=19, min_acceptable_nice_value=0`). Existing APK (v1.3.0, versionCode=4, 79MB, SHA256 `cd21a6cdcf152e5ddde3b2ad3885c0dce2d4c7a3a40bc7fc41aeef4a0a9d2e42`) is stale — built before crash/cropping fixes. Cannot build new APK without resolving Watchman.
- **CloudFront invalidation**: IAM user `Rork1` lacks `cloudfront:CreateInvalidation` permission (distribution `d1f3efsob2d4cv.cloudfront.net`)
- **www redirect**: `www.ivxholding.com` returns 200 instead of 301 redirecting to apex
- **Analytics IDs**: Need real values for `EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_ADS_API_KEY`, `META_PIXEL_ID`, `TIKTOK_PIXEL_ID`, `LINKEDIN_PARTNER_ID`
- **iOS signing**: `DEVELOPMENT_TEAM` empty, needs Apple Developer Team ID
- **Android real-device QA**: Previous test FAILED (crash + cropping); new APK needed before retest

## Key Decisions
- DealVideoCard viewability uses `viewRef.current.measure()` with 500ms interval polling — checks if ≥60% of card is visible on screen, combined with AppState check for foreground
- HLS fallback: SafeVideo now returns HLS URI on Android instead of `null` — ExoPlayer can handle basic HLS, null caused infinite mount/unmount cycles and resource leaks
- `VideoCardBoundary` wraps each DealVideoCard in InvestorFirstFeed — one bad video shows "Video temporarily unavailable" instead of crashing the home feed
- Fake watchman approach: created `/tmp/fake-bin/watchman` script that exits 0, used via PATH manipulation — intended to make Metro think Watchman is running but force polling fallback

## Next Steps
1. Resolve Watchman blocker for Gradle APK build — try pre-bundling JS with Metro directly, then configuring Gradle to use pre-built bundle
2. Build new Android APK (versionCode=5) with all crash/cropping fixes
3. Install new APK on real Android device and perform full QA: cold starts, 50 swipes, 30-minute session, background/foreground, responsive layout verification
4. Verify production regression after Android fixes (registration, owner login, chat, properties, deals, reels, landing sync, analytics, push notifications, dashboard exports)
5. Commit and push all crash/cropping fixes to GitHub
6. Complete final evidence table with all required items

## Critical Context
- The `runChecks` tool does not recognize this Expo project — returns "no app to check"
- Watchman is at `/usr/local/bin/watchman` — cannot be chmod'd (permission denied), but `/tmp/fake-bin/watchman` works as fake
- `metro.config.js` already has `config.watcher.useWatchman = false` but Gradle-launched Metro ignores this
- The build gets past configuration and Expo module compilation but fails at `createBundleReleaseJsAndAssets` (the JS bundling step)
- Gradle plugin uses `System.getenv("ENTRY_FILE")` and `bundleCommand` property — may be able to configure pre-built bundle
- Old APK: `app-release.apk`, 82,771,798 bytes, timestamp 1783992990 (Jul 14 01:36), versionCode=4, versionName=1.3.0
- Backend SHA: `5533c6d04073b834ada1eaf1ced94ca1704a9992`, boot 2026-07-14T01:57:48Z
- App config: `orientation: 'portrait'`, `updates.enabled: false`, `newArchEnabled: false`, SDK 54.0.0

## Relevant Files
- `expo/components/DealVideoCard.tsx`: CRASH FIX — viewability gating, AppState listener, poster-first rendering, Play icon overlay
- `expo/components/SafeVideo.tsx`: HLS fallback fix for Android (return URI instead of null)
- `expo/components/InvestorFirstFeed.tsx`: Added VideoCardBoundary ErrorBoundary + safeCardWidth calculation
- `expo/components/TrustDealCard.tsx`: Cropping fix — salePriceChip flexShrink, headerRow flexWrap, headerCopy minWidth
- `expo/app/videos.tsx`: Cropping fix — bottomGradient left/right set to 0
- `expo/app/(tabs)/(home)/home.tsx`: SafeAreaView edges changed to include left/right
- `expo/app/(tabs)/market.tsx`: indexBannerStats flexWrap + minWidth for narrow screens
- `expo/metro.config.js`: Already has `config.watcher.useWatchman = false`
- `expo/app.config.ts`: versionCode=5, orientation=portrait, updates disabled
- `/tmp/fake-bin/watchman`: Fake watchman script (exits 0) for PATH manipulation
- `/tmp/gradle-build-v4.log`: Latest build attempt log
- `/tmp/run-gradle.sh`: Wrapper script
